nodes.recentposition: Business Growth and Strategy Intern at Realtalk in Fremont, CA
nodes.bios: Hi! My name is Aayush Shah and I initiated in the fall quarter of freshmen year at UCI. I like to play Spikeball and listen to country music in my free time and a fun fact about me is that I have a black belt in Tae Kwon Do. Ask me about football, any other sports, esports, or anything else at recruitment!
